subject: [new pic] - shipment of books for you
body:
Christmas has come early for entrepreneurs everywhere because...

In just 28 days, I'm launching 100M Money Models - and - my "Secret" Project…

To do it, we are going bigger than ever.

We're figuratively and literally backing the truck up with books.

This is the first of many, delivering to multiple warehouses across the country to prepare for the launch - all filled to the brim:

Now why am I showing you this?

Because I need your help.

More specifically, my warehouse guys asked me to ask you for help.

Main reason: shipping 1 million books takes 1 million minutes (at 1 min per book that's 694 days or two full years of work for one man…working 24 hours a day and not sleeping).

So, if you help them out by pre-ordering a copy, I'll make it worth your while.

Because I'm putting my money where my mouth is. I'm really holding nothing back.

If you register and preorder a book, I'll upgrade you to VIP FOR FREE. That gets you:

- Automatic entry to win a day with Alex in Vegas (you and 9 others)
- A copy guaranteed (it's very likely we run out of the first-printing)
- Your copy first (it takes a minute to ship out a million books - think about it)
- A private VIP livestream "Backstage Pass" (separate from the riff raff) with chat enabled to submit questions live to me & 5 mystery headliners.
- $100M LAUNCH Workshop – revealing my exact process which will show you how you could launch anything yourself. I include the sensitive data and details. It's an additional live VIP exclusive virtual event. (Recording included)

Reminder: People who wait to get their copy at the event will pay the same price but don't get any of the VIP Benefits.

There's no one I'd rather do this with.

Alex.

PS - We can only ship books as fast as we can pack them. If you want to guarantee that you get yours, and get it before anyone else, pre-order it now. If you do, you also help out the warehouse team. And for helping us out, I'll give you VIP access at no extra charge.
